title: EFFECT OF A FATIGUE PROTOCOL IN THE STUDY OF ANTERIOR CRUCIATE LIGAMENT INJURIES
author: Ortiz-Sánchez, David
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains the anonymized data generated for the study  “Effect of a Fatigue Protocol in the Study of Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injuries” . It includes measurements collected from participants who completed a standardized fatigue protocol designed to examine its influence on biomechanical, neuromuscular, and functional variables associated with ACL injury risk.
steps_raw: This dataset contains the anonymized data generated for the study  “Effect of a Fatigue Protocol in the Study of Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injuries” . It includes measurements collected from participants who completed a standardized fatigue protocol designed to examine its influence on biomechanical, neuromuscular, and functional variables associated with ACL injury risk.
